description: Plugin-distributed hooks for platform-engineering. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags mechanically-detectable platform anti-patterns (un-owned catalog entity, a golden-path/scaffolder template with no guardrail or no catalog registration, a self-service doc that still routes to a ticket). Set PLATFORM_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
